case_title: MAKHLOUF, WAEL et al VS MCLAUGHLIN, ARTHUR

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MCLAUGHLIN, ARTHUR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,200.00 FILED BY MAKHLOUF, WAEL GHATTAS, MOHAMED AS TO DEFENDANT MCLAUGHLIN, ARTHUR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-10-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAKHLOUF, WAEL GHATTAS, MOHAMED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCLAUGHLIN, ARTHUR $268.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $290.00, PLFT'S CONCEDE DEFT'S ENTITLED TO CREDIT FOR PRIOR REFUND OF $39 APRT. LISTING OF $105 & 25% OF $468. EQUALS $117. PLFTS REDUCED THEIR CLAIM OF $800 DEP REFUND TO CREDIT LANDLORD $261 & SEEK ONLY $539. COURT FINDS DEFT IS ENTITLED: FLOOR REPAIR $50. CURTAINS $38 ADDITIONAL CLEANING $183 IN ADDITION TO $261. DEFT TOTAL OFFSETS $532. DEFT $268 REFUND STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
